sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁישׁא

Transliteration: shı̂yshâ'

Phonetic: shee-shaw'

BDB Definition:

Shisha = "Jehovah contends"
  1. father of Elihoreph and Ahiah, the royal secretaries in the reign of Solomon
    1. apparently the same as 'Shavsha' who held the same position under David

Origin: from the same as H7893

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
